text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I feel no satisfaction from this result. I'm not
content with merely placing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What I want is a perfect victory. Without that... I
can't approve of myself.
choice_data_list: I know you'll place higher next time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You have high expectations of me. Yes, I will
place higher next time. You'll see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I am a member of the distinguished Mejiro family.
Therefore, I am destined to achieve a perfect
victory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: To do so, I must develop my strengths even more!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that will be necessary. If nothing changes, I
won't be able to fulfill my duty.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I would like you to intensify my
training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
After strengthening myself, we shall obtain a
perfect victory, together!
